notes: v0.29.3 — Hotfix for v0.29.2: the SHIP LAB / SHOP MOCKUPS toggle in TESTS couldn't be clicked because the page header sat in front of it in tree order and swallowed the input. Mode toggle is now built last (after the page body), header has mouse_filter = IGNORE, toggle has z_index = 50. Click SHOP MOCKUPS in TESTS to see the three new variant designs (HOLOGRID / MUSIC STAGE / FEATURED SHELF).
